system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat_getall_sx2","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETALL_SX2]
(
	@khuvuc nvarchar(50),
	@donhang nvarchar(max)
)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.order_number, C.masp, C.tensp, 
		SUM(B.order_qty) AS soluong_donhang
	INTO #DONHANG_SANXUAT
	FROM tr_order A
		INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham C ON B.item_number = C.masp
	WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))
		AND A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND B.f_cancelled = 'N'
	GROUP BY A.order_number, C.masp, C.tensp

	SELECT A.order_number, A.masp, A.tensp, B.mact, B.stt, B.chitiet, B.nguyenlieu, B.id_nguyenlieu,
		B.dayy_tc, B.rong_tc, B.dai_tc,
		soluong = B.soluong_tc * A.soluong_donhang
	INTO #CHITIET_DONHANG
	FROM #DONHANG_SANXUAT A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp = B.masp
	--ORDER BY A.order_number, B.masp, B.stt

	SELECT A.donhang_sanxuat, A.masp1, A.mact, SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong_hoanthanh
	INTO #TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT
	FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat A
	WHERE A.donhang_sanxuat IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))
		AND A.congdoan = @khuvuc
		AND A.mact <> '000'
	GROUP BY A.donhang_sanxuat, A.masp1, A.mact

	SELECT A.order_number, A.masp, A.mact, A.stt, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu, A.id_nguyenlieu,
		A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, 
		A.soluong AS soluong_can,
		B.soluong_hoanthanh,
		soluong_conlai = A.soluong - COALESCE(B.soluong_hoanthanh, 0)
	FROM #CHITIET_DONHANG A
		LEFT JOIN #TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT B ON A.order_number = B.donhang_sanxuat AND A.masp = B.masp1 AND A.mact = B.mact
	ORDER BY A.order_number, A.masp, A.stt

	DROP TABLE #DONHANG_SANXUAT, #CHITIET_DONHANG, #TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT;

END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
